question: How many courses do teachers teach at most? Also find the id of the teacher who teaches the most.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS max_courses, teacher_id FROM Classes GROUP BY teacher_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个教师的课程数量并找出最大值

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求统计每个教师教授的课程数量并找出最多课程的教师，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了这一意图，包括使用COUNT(*)进行统计，按teacher_id分组，按课程数量降序排序并限制结果为1。
